title: afrodaphne calabarica
intro: Afrodaphne calabarica, also known as Calabar bean or African calabar bean, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae. The plant's seeds, particularly the calabar bean, have been traditionally used in medicine for their analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of calabar bean alkaloids. The health benefits of Afrodaphne calabarica include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of various conditions such as rheumatism, asthma, and epilepsy. Afrodaphne calabarica is often prepared in herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
